app.title: Another Me
app.tagline: Behind every life choice, there is an abandoned timeline.

home.first_visit: Looks like it's your first visit. Let me get to know you first.

onboarding.title: Before we start, I'd like to know you

simulate.title: New Simulation
simulate.subtitle: Enter a life decision you're struggling with, and let the engine show you possible futures.
simulate.decision_label: What decision are you struggling with?
simulate.decision_placeholder: e.g., Should I quit my job to start a business?
simulate.context_placeholder: Any extra background? e.g., 3 years experience, $30k savings
simulate.black_swan_hint: Low-probability extreme events may be injected
simulate.loading_hint: Typically takes 60-180 seconds (5 concurrent runs + clustering)
simulate.profile_check_desc: The simulation engine generates results based on your profile. If your life has changed recently, consider updating your profile first.

results.title: Simulation Results
results.dark_warning: This simulation contains heavy content. It's just one of many possibilities.
results.recovery_tip: Multiple emotion dimensions are low. Remember, real life always has turning points. AI simulation is just a reference. Talk to a friend if you feel uneasy.
results.dark_dialog_message: This simulation contains heavy content (e.g., serious illness, bankruptcy). It's just one AI-generated possibility, not your actual future. Continue viewing?

history.title: Decision History
history.empty: No simulation records yet. Start your first simulation!

settings.model_pull_hint: Run ollama pull {{model}} to download the target model
settings.ollama_install_hint: Ollama not detected. Visit ollama.com to install, then refresh this page.
settings.black_swan_desc: Allow rare extreme events in simulations
settings.safety_valve_desc: Dark content warning + emotional recovery + daily limit

errors.ollama_unavailable: Cannot connect to Ollama. Make sure it's running on port 11434.
errors.json_parse: AI returned unparseable content. Try again with a different phrasing.
errors.timeout: Simulation timed out. Check Ollama or try a smaller model.
